                                                                                                                                            Input Retrieved Tool37.024.819.016.024.2
                                                                                                                                            Auto. Tool Retrieval45.025.724.019.328.5
                                                                                                                                            End-to-end Agentic Reasoning (DeepAgent)
                                                                                                                                            Input Retrieved Tool53.037.034.043.942.0
                                                                                                                                            Auto. Tool Retrieval64.040.655.050.952.6
                                                                                                                                            方法ToolB. (16k)ToolH. (3.9k)TMDB (54)Spotify (40)平均值
                                                                                                                                            ReAct 工作流
                                                                                                                                            输入检索工具35.025.414.015.022.4
                                                                                                                                            自动工具检索34.037.118.027.828.0
                                                                                                                                            规划与求解工作流
                                                                                                                                            输入检索工具37.024.819.016.024.2
                                                                                                                                            自动工具检索45.025.724.019.328.5
                                                                                                                                            端到端智能体推理 (DeepAgent)
                                                                                                                                            输入检索工具53.037.034.043.942.0
                                                                                                                                            自动工具检索64.040.655.050.952.6

                                                                                                                                            5.2 Main Results on Downstream Applications

                                                                                                                                            5.2 下游应用的主要结果

                                                                                                                                            Table 2 reports the downstream results that require long-horizon interaction and more complex environment dynamics. (1) The autonomous reasoning paradigm generally outperforms the workflow-based methods. Methods that integrate tool use into continuous reasoning outperform workflow-based agents. On GAIA, DeepAgent-32B-Base (46.7) and HiRA (42.5) exceed the best work-flow baseline CodeAct (34.5); on WebShop, DeepAgent-32B-Base scores 32.0 vs. 18.0. This supports that long-horizon tasks benefit from flexible, integrated reasoning-and-action rather than fixed workflows. (2) DeepAgent demonstrates superior performance across various application tasks. DeepAgent achieves the best performance among 32B models: 53.3 on GAIA (vs. 42.5 for HiRA) and 91.8% on ALFWorld (vs. 84.3). We attribute this to DeepAgent's coherent reasoning process and its support for robust long-horizon interaction (e.g., autonomous memory folding). (3) ToolPO training further improves performance on downstream applications. ToolPO further improves downstream performance: GAIA 46.7→53.3(+6.6) and ALFWorld 88.1% →91.8%(+3.7) . This shows the tool-use improvements learned by ToolPO transfer to interactive downstream settings. 表2报告了需要长程交互和更复杂环境动态的下游任务结果。(1) 自主推理范式总体上优于基于工作流的方法。将工具使用整合到持续推理中的方法优于基于工作流的智能体。在GAIA上，DeepAgent-32B-Base (46.7) 和 HiRA (42.5) 超过了最佳工作流基线CodeAct (34.5)；在WebShop上，DeepAgent-32B-Base得分为32.0，而CodeAct为18.0。这支持了长程任务受益于灵活、集成的推理与行动，而非固定工作流的观点。(2) DeepAgent在各类应用任务中表现出卓越性能。DeepAgent在32B模型中取得了最佳表现：GAIA上为53.3（HiRA为42.5），ALFWorld上为91.8%（HiRA为84.3%）。我们将其归功于DeepAgent连贯的推理过程及其对稳健长程交互（如自主记忆折叠）的支持。(3) ToolPO训练进一步提升了下游应用的性能。ToolPO进一步提升了下游表现：GAIA 46.7→53.3(+6.6) 和 ALFWorld 88.1% →91.8%(+3.7)。这表明ToolPO学习到的工具使用改进可以迁移到交互式下游场景中。

                                                                                                                                            5.3 Analysis of Training Dynamics

                                                                                                                                            5.3 训练动态分析

                                                                                                                                            Figure 4 shows the training dynamics of DeepAgent, including the reward scores and validation scores across training steps. As shown in the figure, (1) DeepAgent trained with ToolPO achieves higher upper bounds on both reward and validation scores compared to the commonly used GRPO. (2) Moreover, the training reward exhibits less fluctuation than GRPO, demonstrating better training stability. This indicates that using tool simulators instead of directly training with unstable real-world APIs, along with employing tool-call process supervision, enables more stable and effective training of tool-usage capabilities. 图4展示了DeepAgent的训练动态，包括各训练步的奖励分数和验证分数。如图所示，(1) 与常用的GRPO相比，使用ToolPO训练的DeepAgent在奖励和验证分数上均达到了更高的上限。(2) 此外，训练奖励的波动比GRPO更小，表现出更好的训练稳定性。这表明，使用工具模拟器代替直接在不稳定的真实API上进行训练，并结合工具调用过程监督，能够更稳定、有效地训练工具使用能力。

                                                                                                                                            5.4 Ablation Studies

                                                                                                                                            5.4 消融研究

                                                                                                                                            We conduct ablation studies in Table 3 to validate the effectiveness of each component in DeepAgent. (1) Importance of ToolPO Training: Removing ToolPO training (the Base model) results in the most significant performance drop (from 48.1 to 44.3). This 我们在表3中进行了消融研究，以验证DeepAgent中各组件的有效性。(1) ToolPO训练的重要性：移除ToolPO训练（Base模型）导致了最显著的性能下降（从48.1降至44.3）。这

                                                                                                                                             

                                                                                                                                            Figure 5: Scaling analysis of performance with respect to maximum action limits on WebShop and GAIA datasets. 图5：WebShop和GAIA数据集上性能随最大行动限制变化的缩放分析。

                                                                                                                                            highlights the central role of our end-to-end RL method in enhancing tool use and complex task completion. (2) Effectiveness of Memory Folding: The absence of memory folding also leads to a substantial performance decline (average score drops to 44.2), particularly on the long-horizon task GAIA (from 53.3 to 44.7). This confirms that the autonomous memory folding mechanism, allowing the agent to "take a breath" and replan, is crucial for robust long-term interaction. (3) Contribution of Training Strategies: Removing the tool simulator and tool-call advantage attribution both lead to performance degradation. This validates that the tool simulator enables more stable training, and fine-grained advantage attribution provides precise learning signals. 凸显了我们端到端强化学习方法在增强工具使用和复杂任务完成方面的核心作用。(2) 记忆折叠的有效性：缺失记忆折叠同样导致了性能的大幅下降（平均分降至44.2），特别是在长程任务GAIA上（从53.3降至44.7）。这证实了允许智能体“喘息”并重新规划的自主记忆折叠机制，对于稳健的长期交互至关重要。(3) 训练策略的贡献：移除工具模拟器和工具调用优势归因均会导致性能退化。这验证了工具模拟器实现了更稳定的训练，而细粒度的优势归因提供了精确的学习信号。

                                                                                                                                            5.5 Effectiveness of Tool Retrieval Strategies

                                                                                                                                            5.5 工具检索策略的有效性

                                                                                                                                            To compare pre-retrieving tools versus autonomous discovery during task execution, we conduct experiments shown in Table 4. We find: (1) The on-demand nature of dynamic tool discovery yields superior performance and robust scalability. Autonomous tool retrieval during reasoning consistently outperforms pre-retrieved tools across all frameworks, demonstrating the superiority of on-demand tool access in open-set scenarios. Performance gains are most pronounced on large toolsets like ToolBench (16k tools) and ToolHop (3.9k tools), indicating robust scalability for real-world tasks. (2) DeepAgent synergizes better with dynamic retrieval. Combined with autonomous tool retrieval, our framework achieves the best results by a large margin, scoring 52.6 on average versus 28.5 for the best workflow-based method. This demonstrates that DeepAgent's architecture is uniquely suited for dynamic tool discovery. 为了比较预检索工具与任务执行期间自主发现工具的效果，我们进行了表4所示的实验。我们发现：(1) 动态工具发现的按需特性带来了卓越的性能和稳健的可扩展性。在推理过程中自主检索工具在所有框架中均持续优于预检索工具，证明了按需工具访问在开放集场景中的优越性。在ToolBench（1.6万个工具）和ToolHop（3900个工具）等大型工具集上，性能提升最为显著，表明其对现实世界任务具有稳健的可扩展性。(2) DeepAgent与动态检索的协同效果更好。结合自主工具检索，我们的框架以较大优势取得了最佳结果，平均得分52.6，而最佳工作流方法为28.5。这证明了DeepAgent的架构非常适合动态工具发现。

                                                                                                                                            5.6 Scaling Analysis of Action Limits

                                                                                                                                            5.6 行动限制的缩放分析

                                                                                                                                            Figure 5 illustrates the performance of DeepAgent and ReAct on the WebShop and GAIA datasets as the maximum action limit is varied. The results yield several key insights. (1) DeepAgent consistently and significantly outperforms the ReAct baseline across all tested action limits on both datasets, demonstrating its superior effectiveness. (2) For both agents, performance generally improves as the maximum number of actions increases. This suggests that complex tasks benefit from a longer interaction horizon, allowing for more thorough exploration and reasoning. (3) DeepAgent exhibits stronger scalability. As the action limit increases, the performance gap between DeepAgent and ReAct widens, particularly on WebShop. This sustained gain suggests DeepAgent strategically selects effective, task-relevant actions, avoiding the wasteful steps that limit ReAct's scalability. 图5展示了DeepAgent和ReAct在WebShop和GAIA数据集上随最大动作限制变化时的性能表现。结果揭示了几个关键洞察：(1) 在两个数据集的所有测试动作限制下，DeepAgent始终显著优于ReAct基线，证明了其卓越的有效性。(2) 对于两个智能体，性能通常随最大动作数的增加而提升。这表明复杂任务受益于更长的交互周期，从而允许更充分的探索与推理。(3) DeepAgent展现出更强的可扩展性。随着动作限制的增加，DeepAgent与ReAct之间的性能差距进一步拉大，特别是在WebShop上。这种持续的增益表明DeepAgent能策略性地选择与任务相关的有效动作，避免了限制ReAct可扩展性的无效步骤。

                                                                                                                                            Table 5: Performance with different reasoning model backbones: MOE-based models with 30B and 235B parameters. 表5：不同推理模型主干的性能：参数量为30B和235B的MOE模型。

                                                                                                                                            MethodTool-UsageApplicationAvg.

                                                                                                                                            5.7 Generalization Across Different Backbones

                                                                                                                                            5.7 不同主干模型的泛化能力

                                                                                                                                            Table 5 shows the performance of DeepAgent with different backbone large reasoning models, including Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking and Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking [65]. (1) DeepAgent consistently outperforms workflow-based methods. With both the 30B and 235B MoE-based reasoning models as backbones, DeepAgent maintains a significant performance margin over ReAct and Plan-and-Solve, demonstrating the generalizability of its agentic reasoning approach. (2) DeepAgent scales effectively with larger models. While all methods benefit from scaling the backbone from a 30B to a 235B model, DeepAgent shows the largest absolute performance gains on complex application tasks. 表5展示了DeepAgent在不同主干推理大模型下的表现，包括Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking和Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking [65]。(1) DeepAgent的表现始终优于基于工作流的方法。无论是以30B还是235B的MoE推理模型作为主干，DeepAgent在性能上均显著领先于ReAct和Plan-and-Solve，证明了其智能体推理方法的通用性。(2) DeepAgent能随模型规模扩大而有效提升。尽管所有方法都能从主干模型扩展至30B及235B规模中获益，但DeepAgent在复杂应用任务上展现出了最大的绝对性能增益。

                                                                                                                                            6 Conclusion

                                                                                                                                            6 结论

                                                                                                                                            In this work, we introduce DeepAgent, an end-to-end reasoning agent that unifies thinking, tool discovery, and execution into a single, coherent agentic reasoning process. To enable robust long-horizon interaction, we propose an autonomous memory folding mechanism that compresses interaction history into a structured memory, allowing the agent to "take a breath" and reconsider its strategy. We also introduce ToolPO, an end-to-end RL method that leverages LLM simulated APIs for stable training and fine-grained advantage attribution for precise credit assignment to tool invocations. Extensive experiments on general tool-use and downstream applications demonstrate that DeepAgent significantly outperforms various baseline agents, particularly in open-set scenarios requiring dynamic tool discovery over scalable toolsets. This work opens new avenues for developing more general and scalable LLM agents for broader real-world applications. 本文介绍了DeepAgent，这是一个端到端的推理智能体，将思考、工具发现与执行统一为一个连贯的智能体推理过程。为实现稳健的长程交互，我们提出了一种自主记忆折叠机制，将交互历史压缩为结构化记忆，使智能体能够“喘息”并重新审视其策略。我们还引入了ToolPO，这是一种端到端强化学习方法，利用大语言模型模拟API进行稳定训练，并对工具调用进行细粒度的优势归因，从而实现精确的信用分配。在通用工具使用和下游应用上的大量实验表明，DeepAgent显著优于各类基准智能体，特别是在需要跨可扩展工具集进行动态工具发现的开放集场景中。这项工作为开发更通用、可扩展的大语言模型智能体以应用于更广泛的现实场景开辟了新途径。

                                                                                                                                            Acknowledgments

                                                                                                                                            致谢

The work was partially done at the Engineering Research Center of Next-Generation Intelligent Search and Recommendation, MOE. 本研究获国家自然科学基金（项目编号：62272467）及中国博士后科学基金（项目编号：2025T180440）资助。部分工作在教育部下一代智能搜索与推荐工程研究中心完成。

                                                                                                                                            Appendix

                                                                                                                                            附录

                                                                                                                                            A Datasets

                                                                                                                                            A 数据集

                                                                                                                                            A.1 Training Data

                                                                                                                                            A.1 训练数据

                                                                                                                                            We collected a diverse training dataset spanning four task categories to instill comprehensive agent capabilities. 我们收集了一个涵盖四个任务类别的多样化训练数据集，旨在培养全面的智能体能力。

                                                                                                                                            • General Tool-Use: We sample 1k instances for labeled-tool scenarios and 1k for tool-retrieval from the ToolBench [37] training set. This data is intended to instill a generalized ability to use diverse tools and leverage large toolsets through retrieval.

                                                                                                                                            • 通用工具使用：我们从 ToolBench [37] 训练集中采样了 1k 个标记工具场景实例和 1k 个工具检索实例。这些数据旨在培养模型使用多样化工具的通用能力，并通过检索利用大型工具集。

                                                                                                                                            • Real-World Interaction: We utilize 500 instances from ALF-World [45] and 500 from WebShop [67], sampled from their training sets, to teach the model to interact effectively with environments, manage state transitions, and achieve user goals.

                                                                                                                                            • 现实世界交互：我们利用从 ALF-World [45] 和 WebShop [67] 训练集中采样的各 500 个实例，教导模型与环境进行有效交互、管理状态转换并实现用户目标。

                                                                                                                                            • Deep Research: We include 200 instances from WebDancer [61] and 500 from WebShaperQA [50] to enhance the model's proficiency in using web search and page browsing for in-depth information gathering.

                                                                                                                                            • 深度研究：我们纳入了 200 个来自 WebDancer [61] 和 500 个来自 WebShaperQA [50] 的实例，以增强模型利用网络搜索和页面浏览进行深度信息收集的熟练度。

                                                                                                                                            • Mathematical Reasoning: We collect 0.9k problems from the DeepMath dataset [11] to strengthen the model's ability to use code as a tool for complex mathematical computations.

                                                                                                                                            • 数学推理：我们从 DeepMath 数据集 [11] 中收集了 0.9k 个问题，以加强模型将代码作为工具进行复杂数学计算的能力。

                                                                                                                                            A.2 Benchmarks

                                                                                                                                            A.2 基准测试

                                                                                                                                            We conduct extensive experiments on a wide range of benchmarks, including general tool-use and downstream applications. 我们在一系列广泛的基准测试上进行了深入实验，包括通用工具使用和下游应用。

                                                                                                                                            General Tool-Use. These benchmarks encompass a broad range of distinct tools (from tens to over ten thousand), thus offering a testbed for evaluating different approaches to toolset scaling. 通用工具使用。这些基准测试涵盖了广泛的不同工具（从几十个到超过一万个），从而为评估不同的工具集扩展方法提供了测试平台。

                                                                                                                                            • ToolBench [37]: A large-scale benchmark containing over 16,000 real-world REST APIs spanning 49 categories. Test subsets include 100 test cases, designed to evaluate LLMs in both single-tool and complex multi-tool scenarios.

                                                                                                                                            • ToolBench [37]：一个大规模基准测试，包含跨越 49 个类别的 16,000 多个真实世界 REST API。测试子集包含 100 个测试用例，旨在评估大语言模型在单工具和复杂多工具场景下的表现。

                                                                                                                                            • API-Bank [24]: A comprehensive benchmark for tool-augmented LLMs. It features a runnable evaluation system with 73 API tools and a large training set (over 2,200 dialogues across 2,211 APIs from 1,008 domains), assessing LLMs' capabilities in planning, retrieving, and calling APIs.

                                                                                                                                            • API-Bank [24]：一个针对工具增强型大语言模型的综合基准测试。它具有一个可运行的评估系统，包含 73 个 API 工具和一个大型训练集（涵盖 1,008 个领域、2,211 个 API 的 2,200 多段对话），用于评估大语言模型在规划、检索和调用 API 方面的能力。

                                                                                                                                            • TMDB [47]: A sub-scenario of RestBench focused on the TMDB movie database, consisting of 100 questions that utilize 54 local tools and require an average of 2.3 sequential API calls.

                                                                                                                                            • TMDB [47]：RestBench 的一个子场景，专注于 TMDB 电影数据库，由 100 个问题组成，这些问题利用了 54 个本地工具，平均需要 2.3 次顺序 API 调用。

                                                                                                                                            • Spotify [47]: A sub-scenario of RestBench simulating a Spotify music player, featuring 57 questions and 40 local tools, demanding an average of 2.6 sequential API calls to complete the tasks.

                                                                                                                                            • Spotify [47]：RestBench 的一个子场景，模拟 Spotify 音乐播放器，包含 57 个问题和 40 个本地工具，完成任务平均需要 2.6 次顺序 API 调用。

                                                                                                                                            • ToolHop [69]: A multi-hop reasoning dataset comprising 995 complex questions. It leverages 3,912 locally executable tools and requires between 3 to 7 sequential tool calls per task.

                                                                                                                                            • ToolHop [69]：一个包含995个复杂问题的多跳推理数据集。它利用了3,912个本地可执行工具，且每个任务需要3到7次连续的工具调用。

                                                                                                                                            Downstream Applications. These benchmarks test the capability of different approaches in handling complex real-world tasks, which often require the use of domain-specific toolsets. 下游应用。这些基准测试旨在评估不同方法处理复杂现实任务的能力，这些任务通常需要使用特定领域的工具集。

                                                                                                                                            • ALFWorld [45]: A benchmark for simple Embodied AI tasks set in a text environment. Agents must complete objectives using a finite set of low-level embodied actions (eg., move, take) to test navigation and object manipulation.

                                                                                                                                            • ALFWorld [45]：一个用于文本环境中简单具身智能任务的基准测试。智能体必须使用有限的底层具身动作（如移动、拾取）来完成目标，以测试其导航与物体操作能力。

                                                                                                                                            • WebShop [67]: A challenging online shopping environment that provides 12,087 crowd-sourced tasks over a catalog of 1.18 million products. Agents interact with the simulated e-commerce website using core APIs: search[Query] and choose[Text Button].

                                                                                                                                            • WebShop [67]：一个极具挑战性的在线购物环境，在包含118万种产品的目录中提供了12,087个众包任务。智能体通过核心API：search[Query]和choose[Text Button]与模拟的电子商务网站进行交互。

                                                                                                                                            • GAIA [33]: A complex benchmark for General AI Assistants, consisting of 466 real-world questions (with a 300-question held-out test set). It requires the flexible application of a broad general-purpose toolset including web browsing, code execution, multimodal processing, and file handling.

                                                                                                                                            • GAIA [33]：一个针对通用人工智能助手的复杂基准测试，包含466个现实世界问题（含300个留存测试集问题）。它要求灵活应用广泛的通用工具集，包括网页浏览、代码执行、多模态处理和文件处理。

                                                                                                                                            • Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) [35]: A benchmark featuring 2,500 highly difficult, multi-disciplinary questions (graduate-level). It primarily evaluates the model's intrinsic deep reasoning and multi-modal understanding capabilities, as the questions are designed to be insoluble by simple external search tools.

                                                                                                                                            • 人类终极考试 (HLE) [35]：一个包含2,500个高难度、跨学科问题（研究生水平）的基准测试。它主要评估模型的内在深度推理和多模态理解能力，因为这些问题被设计为无法通过简单的外部搜索工具解决。

                                                                                                                                            Table 6: A case study of DeepAgent for multi-step, multi-tool tasks on ToolBench, showing only key actions. 表6：DeepAgent在ToolBench上处理多步骤、多工具任务的案例研究，仅展示关键动作。

                                                                                                                                            Example of DeepAgent on a Multi-Tool Task DeepAgent处理多工具任务的示例

                                                                                                                                            User Query: 用户查询：

                                                                                                                                            I'm organizing a film festival and I need assistance in finding the best films. Can you search for videos related to 'documentary' on Vimeo? Additionally, fetch the related people in the 'cinema' category to invite them as guest speakers. Finally, provide me with a streaming link for a YouTube video with the ID 'UxxajLWwzqY'. 我正在筹办一个电影节，需要协助寻找最好的电影。你能帮我在Vimeo上搜索与“纪录片”相关的视频吗？此外，请获取“电影”类别下的相关人员以便邀请他们作为演讲嘉宾。最后，请提供ID为“UxxajLWwzqY”的YouTube视频的流媒体链接。

                                                                                                                                            DeepAgent Processing Output DeepAgent处理输出

                                                                                                                                             

                                                                                                                                                Okay, I need to solve three tasks: find documentaries on Vimeo, find     好的，我需要解决三个任务：在Vimeo上查找纪录片，查找

                                                                                                                                                cinema-related people on Vimeo, and get a YouTube streaming link. I'll     Vimeo上与电影相关的人员，并获取YouTube流媒体链接。我将

                                                                                                                                                start by searching for the right tools.     先搜索合适的工具。

                                                                                                                                                    <tool_search> Vimeo video search for documentaries </tool_search>         <tool_search> Vimeo纪录片视频搜索 </tool_search>

                                                                                                                                                The search returned several tools. search_videos and get_videos_by_tag     搜索返回了几个工具。search_videos和get_videos_by_tag

                                                                                                                                                seem most relevant. I'll use the search tool first to find documentaries.     看起来最相关。我将先使用搜索工具来查找纪录片。

                                                                                                                                                    <tool_call> {"name": "search_videos", "arguments": {"query": "documen-         <tool_call> {"name": "search_videos", "arguments": {"query": "documen-

                                                                                                                                                tary", "sort": "most_liked"}} </tool_call> The tool returned a list of pop-     tary", "sort": "most_liked"}} </tool_call> 工具返回了热门纪录片

                                                                                                                                                ular documentary videos. Now for the second task: finding people in     视频列表。现在进行第二个任务：查找“电影”类别中的人物。

                                                                                                                                                the 'cinema' category. Since there is no direct tool to search for people,     由于没有直接搜索人物的工具，我将尝试搜索带有“电影”

                                                                                                                                                I will try searching for videos with the 'cinema' tag and identify their     标签的视频，并从中识别出它们的创作者。

                                                                                                                                                creators.

                                                                                                                                             

                                                                                                                                                        <tool_call> {"name": "get_videos_by_tag", "arguments": {"tag": "cinema",             <tool_call> {"name": "get_videos_by_tag", "arguments": {"tag": "cinema",

                                                                                                                                                    "sort": "most_liked"}} </tool_call> This call returned videos tagged with         "sort": "most_liked"}} </tool_call> 此调用返回了带有“电影”标签的

                                                                                                                                            'cinema' and included user information for each video, such as "John 视频，并包含了每个视频的用户信息，例如“John Doe”

                                                                                                                                                Doe" and "Jane Smith", who are potential guest speakers.     和“Jane Smith”，他们是潜在的演讲嘉宾。

                                                                                                                                            Finally, for the YouTube streaming link, I'll first verify the video ID 最后，关于 YouTube 直播链接，我将首先使用 YouTube 搜索工具

                                                                                                                                            exists using the YouTube search tool. 验证视频 ID 是否存在。

                                                                                                                                                <tool_call> {"name": "search_for_youtube_v3", "arguments": {"part":     <tool_call> {"name": "search_for_youtube_v3", "arguments": {"part":

                                                                                                                                                "snippet", "type": "video", "q": "UxxajLWwzqY"}} </tool_call> The tool     "snippet", "type": "video", "q": "UxxajLWwzqY"}} </tool_call> 工具

                                                                                                                                            confirmed the video ID is valid. I can now construct the streaming link. 确认了视频 ID 有效。现在我可以构建直播链接了。

                                                                                                                                            I will now consolidate all the information to answer the user's query. 我将整合所有信息来回答用户的查询。

                                                                                                                                            Final Answer: 最终答案：

                                                                                                                                                1. Documentaries on Vimeo: Found nature and space documentaries.     1. Vimeo 纪录片：已找到自然与太空类纪录片。

                                                                                                                                            1. Cinema Guest Speakers: John Doe, Jane Smith with Vimeo profiles.

                                                                                                                                            2. 电影嘉宾：John Doe、Jane Smith，附带 Vimeo 个人资料。

                                                                                                                                            1. YouTube Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UxxajLWwzqY

                                                                                                                                            2. YouTube 链接：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UxxajLWwzqY

                                                                                                                                             

                                                                                                                                            B Implementation Details

                                                                                                                                            B 实现细节

                                                                                                                                            For DeepAgent, we use QwQ-32B [51] as the main reasoning model for the results in Table 1 and Table 2, and Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking- 2507 [65] with Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 [65] in Table 5. We use Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct [40] as the auxiliary model for (1) filtering lengthy tool search results and execution outputs (this is also applied to all baselines), (2) simulating RapidAPIs during ToolPO training, and (3) generating folded memory from interaction history. For the baselines, we use either QwQ-32B or Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct as the backbone model. Text generation for all models uses a maximum of 81,920 tokens, with a temperature of 0.7 , top_p of 0.8 , top_k of 20, and a repetition penalty of 1.05 . The maximum number of actions is set to 50 . 对于 DeepAgent，我们在表 1 和表 2 的结果中采用 QwQ-32B [51] 作为主要推理模型，在表 5 中采用 Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking-2507 [65] 和 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 [65]。我们使用 Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct [40] 作为辅助模型，用于 (1) 过滤冗长的工具搜索结果和执行输出（此项也应用于所有基线模型），(2) 在 ToolPO 训练期间模拟 RapidAPI，以及 (3) 从交互历史中生成折叠记忆。对于基线模型，我们使用 QwQ-32B 或 Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct 作为骨干模型。所有模型的文本生成最大长度为 81,920 个 token，温度系数为 0.7，top_p 为 0.8，top_k 为 20，重复惩罚系数为 1.05。最大动作数设定为 50。

                                                                                                                                            Web search and page browsing are implemented using the Google Serper API and Jina Reader API, respectively. The VQA tool is based on Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct [1], which takes a question and an image as input and outputs a model-generated response. Tool retrieval is performed using bge-large-en-v1.5 [62]. All tool documentation follows the standard OpenAI function definition format: {"name": "...", "description": "...", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"param1": {"type": "...", "description": "..."}, ..., "required": ["param1"]}}. This format is used for building the toolset index and for all prompts given to the agents. 网络搜索和页面浏览分别通过 Google Serper API 和 Jina Reader API 实现。VQA 工具基于 Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct [1]，它以问题和图像作为输入，并输出模型生成的响应。工具检索使用 bge-large-en-v1.5 [62] 执行。所有工具文档均遵循标准的 OpenAI 函数定义格式：{"name": "...", "description": "...", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"param1": {"type": "...", "description": "..."}, ..., "required": ["param1"]}}。此格式用于构建工具集索引以及提供给智能体的所有提示词。

                                                                                                                                            Training consists of 100 steps of ToolPO with a batch size of 64, λ1=λ2=1 ,rollout size K=8 ,and a maximum sequence length of 32,768. The maximum number of actions is 50 . The training framework is based on VeRL [41] for multi-node distributed training. All experiments are conducted on 64 NVIDIA H20-141GB GPUs. 训练包含 100 步 ToolPO，批次大小为 64，λ1=λ2=1，展开大小 K=8，最大序列长度为 32,768。最大动作数为 50。训练框架基于用于多节点分布式训练的 VeRL [41]。所有实验均在 64 张 NVIDIA H20-141GB GPU 上进行。

                                                                                                                                            C Memory Schema

                                                                                                                                            C 记忆模式

                                                                                                                                            Our brain-inspired memory architecture contains three components: episodic, working, and tool memory. To support stable memory folding and reduce information loss, we define each component with a fixed JSON schema, enabling reliable parsing and use of compressed memories for long-horizon reasoning. 我们受大脑启发的记忆架构包含三个组件：情景记忆、工作记忆和工具记忆。为了支持稳定的记忆折叠并减少信息丢失，我们为每个组件定义了固定的 JSON 模式，从而实现可靠的解析，并利用压缩记忆进行长程推理。

                                                                                                                                            Episodic Memory Schema. Episodic memory records high-level task progression (milestones, decisions, outcomes) to preserve long-term context. The format is: {"task_description": "A general summary of what the reasoning history has been doing and the overall goals it has been striving for.", "key_events": [{"step": "step number", "description": "A detailed description of the specific action taken, decision made, or milestone achieved at this step, including relevant context and reasoning behind the choice.", "outcome": "A detailed account of the direct result, observation, or feedback received from this action or decision, including any new information gained or changes in the task state."}], "current_progress": "A general summary of the current progress of the task, including what has been completed and what is left to be done."} 情景记忆模式。情景记忆记录高层任务进展（里程碑、决策、结果）以保留长期上下文。格式为：{"task_description": "对推理历史所做工作及整体奋斗目标的概括。", "key_events": [{"step": "步骤编号", "description": "对该步骤所采取的具体行动、做出的决策或达成的里程碑的详细描述，包括相关背景和选择背后的推理。", "outcome": "对该行动或决策产生的直接结果、观察或反馈的详细说明，包括获得的任何新信息或任务状态的变化。"}], "current_progress": "对任务当前进展的概括，包括已完成部分和剩余工作。"}

                                                                                                                                            Working Memory Schema. Working memory captures the immediate goal, active challenges, and next actions to maintain continuity across folds. The format is: {"immediate_goal": "A clear summary of the current subgoal-what you are actively working toward at this moment.", "current_challenges": "A concise summary of the main obstacles or difficulties you are presently encountering.", "next_actions": [{type": "tool_call or planning ordecision", description": "Anticipate and describe the next concrete action you intend to take to advance the task."}]} 工作记忆模式。工作记忆捕捉即时目标、当前挑战和下一步行动，以保持折叠间的连续性。格式为：{"immediate_goal": "对当前子目标的清晰总结——即你此刻正在积极努力实现的目标。", "current_challenges": "对你目前遇到的主要障碍或困难的简明总结。", "next_actions": [{"type": "工具调用或规划或决策", "description": "预测并描述你打算采取的下一步具体行动以推进任务。"}]}

                                                                                                                                            Tool Memory Schema. Tool memory consolidates tool-use experience (success rates, effective parameters, common errors) and derives reusable rules. The format is: {"tools_used": [{"tool_name": "string", "success_rate": "float", "effective_parameters": ["param1", "param2"], "common_errors": ["error_type1", "error_type2"], "response_pattern": "description of typical output", "experience": "Reflect and summarize your experience, including both successes and failures."}], "derived_rules": ["When X condition occurs, prefer tool Y", "Tool Z works best with parameter A set to B"]} 工具记忆模式。工具记忆整合工具使用经验（成功率、有效参数、常见错误）并推导出可复用的规则。格式为：{"tools_used": [{"tool_name": "字符串", "success_rate": "浮点数", "effective_parameters": ["参数1", "参数2"], "common_errors": ["错误类型1", "错误类型2"], "response_pattern": "典型输出描述", "experience": "反思并总结你的经验，包括成功和失败的案例。"}], "derived_rules": ["当出现 X 条件时，优先使用工具 Y", "工具 Z 在参数 A 设为 B 时效果最佳"]}

                                                                                                                                            D Case Study

                                                                                                                                            D 案例研究

                                                                                                                                            To illustrate the effectiveness of our DeepAgent framework in handling complex, multi-step tasks that require coordinated use of multiple tools, we present a detailed case in Table 6. This example demonstrates how DeepAgent autonomously navigates tool selection, executes sequential actions, and synthesizes results to provide comprehensive solutions to user queries. 为了展示我们的 DeepAgent 框架在处理需要协同使用多种工具的复杂多步任务时的有效性，我们在表 6 中展示了一个详细案例。该示例演示了 DeepAgent 如何自主导航工具选择、执行顺序操作并综合结果，从而为用户查询提供全面的解决方案。

                                                                                                                                            快速帮助

                                                                                                                                            当前模式

                                                                                                                                            链接样式：—

                                                                                                                                            复制为：—

                                                                                                                                            常用操作

                                                                                                                                            # 图标：复制段落链接 / 片段

                                                                                                                                            收起/展开大纲：O；回到顶部：T

                                                                                                                                            显示/隐藏注释：C

                                                                                                                                            链接样式

                                                                                                                                            • 原文：#段落（Alt+1）
                                                                                                                                            • %编码：#%E6%AE%B5%E8%90%BD（Alt+2）
                                                                                                                                            • 富文本片段（HTML 片段）（Alt+3）
                                                                                                                                            • 循环切换：U

                                                                                                                                            复制格式（仅“原文 / %编码”可用）

                                                                                                                                            • 设为 URL：Alt+U
                                                                                                                                            • 设为 Markdown：Alt+M
                                                                                                                                            • 二者切换：M

                                                                                                                                            大纲与导航

                                                                                                                                            • 展开全部：E；收起全部：R
                                                                                                                                            • 滚动时自动高亮并展开对应大纲分支
